description.content: Operations for uploading and retrieving CRM data
Uploads CRM objects (such as deals, accounts, contacts, or leads) to Gong for association with call data. Objects are uploaded for a specific integration and object type.

query.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the CRM integration.
(Required) The type of CRM object being uploaded (e.g., Deal, Account, Contact, Lead).
A client-generated request ID for tracking.

(Required) The client request ID from the original upload request.

response.name: Successful response containing the upload status.

Operations for registering and managing CRM integrations
Registers a new CRM integration with Gong. A successful registration enables uploading CRM data to Gong. Only one active integration per integration type is allowed.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

Operations for managing CRM object schemas
Uploads the schema definition for a CRM object type including field definitions, labels, and data types. This defines the structure of CRM objects that can be uploaded to Gong.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

response.name: Bad request due to invalid schema definition.

The Gong CRM API enables integration with CRM systems by providing endpoints to register integrations, upload CRM objects and schemas, map users and fields, and manage associations between calls and CRM records.
